docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ERIC WRIGHT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEONARD YOUNG $1,836.56 PRINCIPAL, $1,886.42 INTEREST, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,742.98, ($97. COSTS ADDED AND 743.84 DEDUCTED AFTER ORIGINAL JUDGMENT OF 5/13/96-TO EXPLAIN ABOVE PRINCIPAL) FOR A TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $3,742.98. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED AND MAILED.
